specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64 bit), Windows 11 (64 bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-11400 or AMD Ryzen 5 3600X
  • Memory: 12 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 Ti (4GB) vagy AMD Radeon RX 570 (4GB)
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 50 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible sound card.
  • Additional Notes: Target 30-45 FPS at 1080p on Medium settings.
specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64 bit), Windows 11 (64 bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i7-9700K vagy AMD Ryzen 5 3600
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060 (6GB) vagy AMD Radeon RX 6600 (8GB)
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 50 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible sound card (Surround sound support recommended for the best experience)
  • Additional Notes: Target 60 FPS at 1080p on High settings. Epic/4K Experience: For the ultimate experience using full Nanite and Lumen features at 4K resolution, we recommend 32 GB RAM, an RTX 3080 / RX 6800 XT or better, and an SSD.
